con:part.con:content: <wsdl:definitions targetNamespace="http://njm.com/EnterpriseRating/WCCPredictiveModeling/Pricing" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:tm="http://microsoft.com/wsdl/mime/textMatching/" xmlns:soapenc="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/" xmlns:mime="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/mime/" xmlns:tns="http://njm.com/EnterpriseRating/WCCPredictiveModeling/Pricing" xmlns:s="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:soap12="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap12/" xmlns:http="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/http/" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/"> <wsdl:types> <s:schema elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://njm.com/EnterpriseRating/WCCPredictiveModeling/Pricing"> <s:element name="RatePolicy"> <s:complexType> <s:sequence> <s:element minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1" name="WCCPredictiveModelingPolicies" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfWCCPredictiveModelingPolicy"/> </s:sequence> </s:complexType> </s:element> <s:complexType name="ArrayOfWCCPredictiveModelingPolicy"> <s:sequence> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="WCCPredictiveModelingPolicy" nillable="true" type="tns:WCCPredictiveModelingPolicy"/> </s:sequence> </s:complexType> <s:complexType name="WCCPredictiveModelingPolicy"> <s:sequence> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="Claims" type="tns:ArrayOfClaims"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="PolicyNumber" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="RateIndicator" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="PolicyEffectiveDate" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="PolicyInceptionDate" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="State" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="RatingModel" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="DistinctClassCodePos1" nillable="true" type="s:int"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="DistinctClassCodePos12" nillable="true" type="s:int"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="DistinctClassCodePos123" nillable="true" type="s:int"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="DistinctClassCodePos1234" nillable="true" type="s:int"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="HazardGrade" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="ClaimCreatedDate" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="Payroll" nillable="true" type="s:int"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="NumberofClassCodes" nillable="true" type="s:int"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="OSHAInspectionType" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="Submodel" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="NumberofEmployees" nillable="true" type="s:int"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="NumberofInspectionsPerEmployee" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="CountOfOSHAInspectionTypeA" nillable="true" type="s:int"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="CountOfOSHAInspectionTypeB" nillable="true" type="s:int"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="CountOfOSHAInspectionTypeC" nillable="true" type="s:int"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="CountOfOSHAInspectionTypeD" nillable="true" type="s:int"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="CountOfOSHAInspectionTypeE" nillable="true" type="s:int"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="CountOfOSHAInspectionTypeF" nillable="true" type="s:int"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="CountOfOSHAInspectionTypeG" nillable="true" type="s:int"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="CountOfOSHAInspectionTypeH" nillable="true" type="s:int"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="CountOfOSHAInspectionTypeI" nillable="true" type="s:int"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="CountOfOSHAInspectionTypeJ" nillable="true" type="s:int"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="CountOfOSHAInspectionTypeK" nillable="true" type="s:int"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="CountOfOSHAInspectionTypeL" nillable="true" type="s:int"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="CountOfOSHAInspectionTypeM" nillable="true" type="s:int"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="NumberofInspectionsAPerEmployee" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="NumberofInspectionsBPerEmployee" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="NumberofInspectionsCPerEmployee" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="NumberofInspectionsDPerEmployee" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="NumberofInspectionsEPerEmployee" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="NumberofInspectionsFPerEmployee" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="NumberofInspectionsGPerEmployee" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="NumberofInspectionsHPerEmployee" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="NumberofInspectionsIPerEmployee" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="NumberofInspectionsJPerEmployee" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="NumberofInspectionsKPerEmployee" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="NumberofInspectionsLPerEmployee" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="NumberofInspectionsMPerEmployee" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="ISOClaimIndicator" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="AverageLengthOfInspection" nillable="true" type="s:int"/> </s:sequence> </s:complexType> <s:complexType name="ArrayOfClaims"> <s:sequence> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="Claims" nillable="true" type="tns:Claims"/> </s:sequence> </s:complexType> <s:complexType name="Claims"> <s:sequence> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="BodyParts" type="tns:ArrayOfBodyParts"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="ClaimNumberString" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="DateOfLoss" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="TotalIncurred" nillable="true" type="s:int"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="HowReported" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="ClaimType" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="InjuryCause" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="DetailedCauseofInjury" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="ClaimantGender" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="ClaimantDateOfBirth" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="DateReported" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="DaysOfServiceLength" nillable="true" type="s:int"/> </s:sequence> </s:complexType> <s:complexType name="ArrayOfBodyParts"> <s:sequence> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="BodyParts" nillable="true" type="tns:BodyParts"/> </s:sequence> </s:complexType> <s:complexType name="BodyParts"> <s:sequence> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="BodyPartSequenceNumber" nillable="true" type="s:int"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="BodyPart" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="PrimaryBodyPartIndicator" type="s:string"/> </s:sequence> </s:complexType> <s:element name="RatePolicyResponse"> <s:complexType> <s:sequence> <s:element minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1" name="RatePolicyResult" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfWCCPredictiveModelingPolicyPremium"/> </s:sequence> </s:complexType> </s:element> <s:complexType name="ArrayOfWCCPredictiveModelingPolicyPremium"> <s:sequence> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="WCCPredictiveModelingPolicyPremium" nillable="true" type="tns:WCCPredictiveModelingPolicyPremium"/> </s:sequence> </s:complexType> <s:complexType name="WCCPredictiveModelingPolicyPremium"> <s:sequence> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="SystemError" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="ErrorInd" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="LevelError" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="TableLookupError" type="tns:ArrayOfString"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="State" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="PolicyNumber" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="RateEffectiveDate" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="RateIndicator" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="RatingModel" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="ClaimSeverityPreScore" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="SeverityScore" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="InterceptFactor" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="ModelBranchFactor" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="ClaimantGenderFactor" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="TotalIncurredFactor" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="HazardGradeFactor" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="ClassCodeFactor" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="NatureOfInjuryFactor" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="ClaimantAgeFactor" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="PolicyTenureFactor" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="ClaimNumber" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="GenderHazardFactor" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="WKDSvcFactor" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="OSHAInspectFactor" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="Model" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="Submodel" type="s:string"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="NumberClassCodesxPayrollFactor" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="OSHAInspectionPerEmployeeFactor" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="ISOClaimSearchFactor" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="OSHAInspectionDaysFactor" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="OSHAInspectNatureAFactor" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="OSHAInspectNatureBFactor" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="OSHAInspectNatureCFactor" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="OSHAInspectNatureDFactor" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="OSHAInspectNatureEFactor" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="OSHAInspectNatureFFactor" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="OSHAInspectNatureGFactor" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="OSHAInspectNatureHFactor" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="OSHAInspectNatureIFactor" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="OSHAInspectNatureJFactor" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="OSHAInspectNatureKFactor" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="OSHAInspectNatureLFactor" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="OSHAInspectNatureMFactor" nillable="true" type="s:decimal"/> </s:sequence> </s:complexType> <s:complexType name="ArrayOfString"> <s:sequence> <s:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="string" nillable="true" type="s:string"/> </s:sequence> </s:complexType> </s:schema> </wsdl:types> <wsdl:message name="RatePolicySoapIn"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:RatePolicy"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="RatePolicySoapOut"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:RatePolicyResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:portType name="WCCPredictiveModelingServiceSoap"> <wsdl:operation name="RatePolicy"> <wsdl:input message="tns:RatePolicySoapIn"/> <wsdl:output message="tns:RatePolicySoapOut"/> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:portType> <wsdl:binding name="WCCPredictiveModelingServiceSoap" type="tns:WCCPredictiveModelingServiceSoap"> <soap:binding transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <wsdl:operation name="RatePolicy"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://njm.com/EnterpriseRating/WCCPredictiveModeling/Pricing/RatePolicy" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:binding> <wsdl:service name="WCCPredictiveModelingService"> <wsdl:port name="WCCPredictiveModelingServiceSoap" binding="tns:WCCPredictiveModelingServiceSoap"> <soap:address location="http://localhost:38667/WCCPredictiveModelingService.asmx"/> </wsdl:port> </wsdl:service> </wsdl:definitions>

con:call.name: Request 1
con:call.con:request: <soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:pric="http://njm.com/EnterpriseRating/WCCPredictiveModeling/Pricing"> <soapenv:Header/> <soapenv:Body> <pric:RatePolicy> <pric:WCCPredictiveModelingPolicies> <!--Zero or more repetitions:--> <pric:WCCPredictiveModelingPolicy> <pric:Claims> <pric:Claims> <pric:BodyParts> <pric:BodyParts> <pric:BodyPartSequenceNumber>200</pric:BodyPartSequenceNumber> <pric:BodyPart>Mouth</pric:BodyPart> <pric:PrimaryBodyPartIndicator>Y</pric:PrimaryBodyPartIndicator> </pric:BodyParts> </pric:BodyParts> <pric:ClaimNumberString>W2023-013073</pric:ClaimNumberString> <pric:DateOfLoss>05/08/2020</pric:DateOfLoss> <pric:TotalIncurred>0</pric:TotalIncurred> <pric:HowReported>Phone</pric:HowReported> <pric:ClaimType>NTL</pric:ClaimType> <pric:InjuryCause>Fall, slip, or trip injury, miscellaneous</pric:InjuryCause> <pric:DetailedCauseofInjury>Puncture</pric:DetailedCauseofInjury> <pric:ClaimantGender>Male</pric:ClaimantGender> <pric:ClaimantDateOfBirth>02/02/1982</pric:ClaimantDateOfBirth> <pric:DateReported>02/03/2023</pric:DateReported> <pric:DaysOfServiceLength>999999999</pric:DaysOfServiceLength> </pric:Claims> </pric:Claims> <pric:PolicyNumber>W770776</pric:PolicyNumber> <pric:PolicyEffectiveDate>04/08/2020</pric:PolicyEffectiveDate> <pric:PolicyInceptionDate>04/01/2020</pric:PolicyInceptionDate> <pric:State>NJ</pric:State> <pric:RatingModel>FNOL</pric:RatingModel> <pric:DistinctClassCodePos1>3</pric:DistinctClassCodePos1> <pric:DistinctClassCodePos12>4</pric:DistinctClassCodePos12> <pric:DistinctClassCodePos123>4</pric:DistinctClassCodePos123> <pric:DistinctClassCodePos1234>4</pric:DistinctClassCodePos1234> <pric:HazardGrade>C</pric:HazardGrade> <pric:ClaimCreatedDate>02/03/2023</pric:ClaimCreatedDate> <pric:Payroll>320000</pric:Payroll> <pric:NumberofClassCodes>4</pric:NumberofClassCodes> <pric:Submodel>Model2</pric:Submodel> <pric:NumberofEmployees>-999999999</pric:NumberofEmployees> <pric:NumberofInspectionsPerEmployee>-999999999</pric:NumberofInspectionsPerEmployee> <pric:NumberofInspectionsAPerEmployee>-999999999</pric:NumberofInspectionsAPerEmployee> <pric:NumberofInspectionsBPerEmployee>-999999999</pric:NumberofInspectionsBPerEmployee> <pric:NumberofInspectionsCPerEmployee>-999999999</pric:NumberofInspectionsCPerEmployee> <pric:NumberofInspectionsDPerEmployee>-999999999</pric:NumberofInspectionsDPerEmployee> <pric:NumberofInspectionsEPerEmployee>-999999999</pric:NumberofInspectionsEPerEmployee> <pric:NumberofInspectionsFPerEmployee>-999999999</pric:NumberofInspectionsFPerEmployee> <pric:NumberofInspectionsGPerEmployee>-999999999</pric:NumberofInspectionsGPerEmployee> <pric:NumberofInspectionsHPerEmployee>-999999999</pric:NumberofInspectionsHPerEmployee> <pric:NumberofInspectionsIPerEmployee>-999999999</pric:NumberofInspectionsIPerEmployee> <pric:NumberofInspectionsJPerEmployee>-999999999</pric:NumberofInspectionsJPerEmployee> <pric:NumberofInspectionsKPerEmployee>-999999999</pric:NumberofInspectionsKPerEmployee> <pric:NumberofInspectionsLPerEmployee>-999999999</pric:NumberofInspectionsLPerEmployee> <pric:NumberofInspectionsMPerEmployee>-999999999</pric:NumberofInspectionsMPerEmployee> <pric:ISOClaimIndicator>No</pric:ISOClaimIndicator> <pric:AverageLengthOfInspection>-999999999</pric:AverageLengthOfInspection> </pric:WCCPredictiveModelingPolicy> </pric:WCCPredictiveModelingPolicies> </pric:RatePolicy> </soapenv:Body> </soapenv:Envelope>

con:call.name: Copy of Request 1
con:call.con:request: <soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:pric="http://njm.com/EnterpriseRating/WCCPredictiveModeling/Pricing"> <soapenv:Header/> <pric:NumberofClassCodes>4</pric:NumberofClassCodes> <pric:Submodel>Model2</pric:Submodel> <pric:NumberofEmployees>-999999999</pric:NumberofEmployees> <pric:NumberofInspectionsAPerEmployee>-999999999</pric:NumberofInspectionsAPerEmployee> <pric:NumberofInspectionsBPerEmployee>-999999999</pric:NumberofInspectionsBPerEmployee> <pric:NumberofInspectionsCPerEmployee>-999999999</pric:NumberofInspectionsCPerEmployee> <pric:NumberofInspectionsDPerEmployee>-999999999</pric:NumberofInspectionsDPerEmployee> <pric:NumberofInspectionsEPerEmployee>-999999999</pric:NumberofInspectionsEPerEmployee> <pric:NumberofInspectionsFPerEmployee>-999999999</pric:NumberofInspectionsFPerEmployee> <pric:NumberofInspectionsGPerEmployee>-999999999</pric:NumberofInspectionsGPerEmployee> <pric:NumberofInspectionsHPerEmployee>-999999999</pric:NumberofInspectionsHPerEmployee> <pric:NumberofInspectionsIPerEmployee>-999999999</pric:NumberofInspectionsIPerEmployee> <pric:NumberofInspectionsJPerEmployee>-999999999</pric:NumberofInspectionsJPerEmployee> <pric:NumberofInspectionsKPerEmployee>-999999999</pric:NumberofInspectionsKPerEmployee> <pric:NumberofInspectionsLPerEmployee>-999999999</pric:NumberofInspectionsLPerEmployee> <pric:NumberofInspectionsMPerEmployee>-999999999</pric:NumberofInspectionsMPerEmployee> <pric:ISOClaimIndicator>No</pric:ISOClaimIndicator> </pric:WCCPredictiveModelingPolicy> con:call.name: Request 3
con:call.con:request: <soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:pric="http://njm.com/EnterpriseRating/WCCPredictiveModeling/Pricing">\r <soapenv:Header/>\r <soapenv:Body>\r <pric:RatePolicy>\r <pric:WCCPredictiveModelingPolicies>\r <!--Zero or more repetitions:-->\r <pric:WCCPredictiveModelingPolicy>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <pric:Claims>\r <!--Zero or more repetitions:-->\r <pric:Claims>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <pric:BodyParts>\r <!--Zero or more repetitions:-->\r <pric:BodyParts>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <pric:BodyPartSequenceNumber>?</pric:BodyPartSequenceNumber>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <pric:BodyPart>?</pric:BodyPart>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <pric:PrimaryBodyPartIndicator>?</pric:PrimaryBodyPartIndicator>\r </pric:BodyParts>\r </pric:BodyParts>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <pric:ClaimNumberString>?</pric:ClaimNumberString>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <pric:DateOfLoss>?</pric:DateOfLoss>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <pric:TotalIncurred>?</pric:TotalIncurred>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <pric:HowReported>?</pric:HowReported>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <pric:ClaimType>?</pric:ClaimType>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <pric:InjuryCause>?</pric:InjuryCause>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <pric:DetailedCauseofInjury>?</pric:DetailedCauseofInjury>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <pric:ClaimantGender>?</pric:ClaimantGender>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <pric:ClaimantDateOfBirth>?</pric:ClaimantDateOfBirth>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <pric:DateReported>?</pric:DateReported>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <pric:DaysOfServiceLength>?</pric:DaysOfServiceLength>\r </pric:Claims>\r </pric:Claims>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <pric:PolicyNumber>?</pric:PolicyNumber>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <pric:RateIndicator>?</pric:RateIndicator>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <pric:PolicyEffectiveDate>?</pric:PolicyEffectiveDate>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <pric:PolicyInceptionDate>?</pric:PolicyInceptionDate>\r
